observations.correspondence_rationale: The passage's depiction of standing amidst wars and death, with the earth as a sustaining foundation, symbolically resonates with Psalm 46:1-3, where God is described as a refuge and strength amid turmoil and upheaval, sustaining those who face chaos and destruction.
observations.summary: The text metaphorically portrays the earth as a sustaining foundation amid internal and external wars, echoing the biblical motif of divine refuge and strength in the face of conflict and death.

evidence.quote: "Look at the war within you. Look at the wars between peoples. Death is not a distant shore. It is the very sea in which you are standing at this moment. And I am the very earth those mountains are rooted in, boy. Your struggle is my foundation. Every step you take upward is a step I must sustain."
